title: Active Lane Stage Lens Bar
summary: Added a sticky stage lens inside the mounted lane stage so the active view, level XP, gate pressure, active work, and trail depth stay visible while scrolling inside the cockpit.
goalFit: Improves the Atlas as a centralized game-like control room by keeping orientation and pressure signals visible inside the bounded selected-lane stage.
proof: web/app.js derives activeLaneStageLens data from lane state and renders it inside active-lane-mounted-stage
web/styles.css makes active-lane-stage-lens sticky with compact signal chips and subtle pulse motion
web/data/snapshot.json records the unlock in the platform engineering lane after regeneration
